task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is launched and being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The document includes required sections formatted with Heading styles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sections like 'Executive Summary', 'Corrective Actions', or specific building names (e.g., 'Main Academic Hall') are visible in large, bold font typical of Heading 1 or Heading 2 styles, or the style dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2'.

task_completion.description: Tables are created for individual building violations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One or more tables containing columns for violations, NFPA codes, and corrective actions are visible under the building sections.

task_completion.description: A Campus Compliance Summary table is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table summarizing the buildings and their compliance scores (e.g., showing scores like 78, 82, 91, 76, 64) is visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are inserted in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible at the bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages, or the Insert Footer/Page Number dialog is seen.

task_completion.description: An automatic Table of Contents is created at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A gray-shaded Table of Contents block is visible at the top of the document, listing the document's sections and their corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window displays 'FSI_Report_Glenwood_2024.odt' or the Save As dialog shows this filename being saved in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer interface with menus being clicked, dialogs (like Insert Table, Indexes and Tables, or Page Number) open, or text being actively typed and formatted.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass the GUI and generate the .odt file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'python generate_odt.py' or similar scripts that programmatically create the final output file without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report is for 'Glenwood Community College District'. Building names and scores: Main Academic Hall (78), Science & Technology Center (82), Student Services Center (91), Performing Arts Center (76), Physical Plant / Maintenance Building (64). The document must contain an automatic Table of Contents, Heading 1 and 2 styles, violation tables, a Campus Compliance Summary table, and page numbers in the footer. The final file must be named 'FSI_Report_Glenwood_2024.odt'.
